headline: State Street Takes 5% Nike Stake As Tariff Lawsuits Cloud Outlook
summary: State Street Corp has disclosed a passive 5% stake in NIKE (NYSE:NKE), signaling a significant holding by a major institutional investor. Nike is facing ongoing and escalating consumer lawsuits tied to tariff-related price increases, following a Supreme Court ruling that invalidated certain tariffs. Plaintiffs claim Nike did not refund tariff-linked price increases after the ruling, creating potential legal, operational, and brand challenges. Nike, through its NIKE and Jordan brands, is a...
